---
title: "Whitepapers"
subtitle: "Long-form position papers on UIAO capability domains"
doc-type: landing
canon-source: "src/uiao/canon/"
derived-from: "uiao canon"
aspirational: true
---

::: {.callout-important title="Content pending"}
This section is part of the customer-documents skeleton but has not yet been
authored. The slugs below are reserved; content will land in line with the
[Customer Documents Roadmap](../ROADMAP.qmd).
:::

Whitepapers are long-form position papers aimed at federal technology
leaders evaluating identity-first governance substrates. Each takes a
capability or integration area and walks it end-to-end: problem statement,
UIAO's approach, target outcomes, and open risks.

## Planned pages

| Slug | Topic | Canon anchor |
|---|---|---|
| `modernization-governance-whitepaper.md` | Governance substrate for federal modernization | `src/uiao/canon/substrate-manifest.yaml` |
| `scubagear-integration-whitepaper.md` | ScubaGear conformance adapter integration | `src/uiao/canon/adapter-registry.yaml` |
| `uiao-governance-os-whitepaper.md` | Canon-anchored governance OS — architecture and proof | `src/uiao/canon/docs/01_UnifiedArchitecture.qmd` |
| `zero-trust-governance-whitepaper.md` | Zero-trust identity anchoring and enforcement | `src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-008-zero-trust-identity.md` |
